column1: Ildemaro Vargas stands out as a reliable pick at home, riding a strong recent stretch and hitting safely in seven of his last eight games. Bobby Witt Jr. offers similar consistency near the top of Kansas City's order, also benefiting from a favorable park and platoon edge. Juan Soto and Luis Arraez bring steady contact skills and both face soft pitching, but Vargas’s combination of recent form and matchup makes him the most dependable option today.
